caption: The video displays a computer screen running a Linux-based terminal emulator. The screen is split into two identical side-by-side terminal windows, both titled "Terminal" and showing a dark background with white and colorful text. The interface includes a top bar with "Activities" and "Oct 28 00:22". The terminal windows show a sequence of command-line operations related to a software build or installation process. Legible text includes "sudo chown -R" and "sudo chmod -R", followed by lines of output containing "leavysouth", "coprocessor", and "megafull". A recurring phrase in the logs is "starter patching/optimizing". The scene remains static across the frames, as the text and layout of the windows do not change, indicating a paused state or a very slow output process. There are no people or physical objects present in the scene.
